skill.name: longbridge-portfolio
skill.description:
Account assets, equity and fund positions, P&L, cash flow records, account statements, margin ratios, buy-power estimates, order management, and DCA recurring investments via Longbridge (most require Trade permission). Frameworks: portfolio diagnosis, rebalancing, asset allocation, risk analysis (VaR/CVaR), performance attribution, and tax-loss harvesting.
Triggers: "持仓", "账户", "盈亏", "资产", "对账单", "下单", "买入", "卖出", "撤单", "定投", "组合诊断", "再平衡", "资产配置", "风险分析", "绩效归因", "税损收割", "持倉", "賬戶", "盈虧", "對賬單", "下單", "買入", "賣出", "組合診斷", "再平衡", "稅損收割", "positions", "portfolio", "P&L", "order", "buy", "sell", "DCA", "statement", "risk analysis", "rebalancing", "tax harvesting", "我的风险", "持仓风险", "风险敞口", "資產", "資產配置", "風險分析", "績效歸因", "撤單"
skill.summary: Longbridge portfolio and order management skill for account data, positions, P&L analysis, rebalancing, risk metrics, and tax-loss harvesting.
skill.author: longbridge

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only documentation skill with no executable scripts or commands. All 265 static findings are false positives: the 246 'external_commands' findings match markdown backtick formatting in documentation, the 18 'weak cryptographic algorithm' findings match text strings in reference docs, and 'system reconnaissance' findings match risk-analysis terminology. The skill instructs the LLM to call the longbridge CLI or MCP server at runtime—it does not execute code itself.

content.user_title: Manage Your Longbridge Portfolio and Orders
content.value_statement: Managing a Longbridge account across multiple sub-accounts, asset classes, and order types is complex. This skill provides structured access to account data, position analysis, and portfolio optimization frameworks through natural language.
actual_capabilities: View account assets, net value, cash balances, and buying power
List stock and fund positions across all sub-accounts with P&L
Generate portfolio diagnosis reports (concentration, sector, correlation)
Calculate risk metrics including VaR, CVaR, Sharpe ratio, and max drawdown
Build rebalancing plans with weight drift and transaction cost analysis
Identify tax-loss harvesting opportunities with wash-sale tracking
limitations: Most account queries require Trade permission—read-only Quote permission is insufficient
Mutating operations (orders, DCA) always require explicit user confirmation before execution
Performance attribution and tax-loss analysis depend on historical data availability

use_cases.title: Daily portfolio check
use_cases.description: Review account assets, positions, and intraday P&L in natural language

use_cases.title: Risk and rebalancing analysis
use_cases.description: Diagnose concentration risk, calculate VaR, and generate rebalancing trade lists

use_cases.title: Tax-loss harvesting
use_cases.description: Identify unrealised losses and tax-efficient substitutes while tracking wash-sale windows

prompt_templates.title: Quick account snapshot
prompt_templates.prompt: Show my total account assets, cash balance, and today's P&L.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a quick account overview

prompt_templates.title: Position detail
prompt_templates.prompt: List all my stock positions with current market value and unrealised P&L.

prompt_templates.title: Portfolio diagnosis
prompt_templates.prompt: Diagnose my portfolio: check concentration risk, sector distribution, and correlation among top holdings.

prompt_templates.title: Rebalancing plan
prompt_templates.prompt: My target allocation is 60% stocks, 30% bonds, 10% cash. Generate a rebalancing trade list from my current portfolio.

output_examples.input: What are my top 5 positions by market value?
output_examples.output: Your top 5 positions: NVDA.US (32%), AAPL.US (18%), 700.HK (12%), TSLA.US (10%), 600519.SH (8%). Total portfolio value: $245,000. Concentration warning: top 2 positions exceed 50%.

output_examples.input: Calculate my portfolio VaR at 95% confidence for 1 day.
output_examples.output: 1-day Value-at-Risk (95% confidence): $4,820 (1.97% of portfolio). CVaR: $6,150. Method: historical simulation over 252 trading days. Worst single-day loss observed: -3.2%.

best_practices: Always present a preview before executing mutating operations (orders, DCA changes) and wait for explicit confirmation
Use the framework reference files (portfolio-diagnosis, risk-analysis, etc.) for structured analysis rather than ad-hoc queries
Run `longbridge <subcommand> --help` to discover current flags—do not hard-code CLI option names in prompts
anti_patterns: Executing buy/sell orders without first showing a preview and receiving user confirmation
Hard-coding CLI subcommand names or flags in prompts—the CLI evolves and hard-coded names go stale
Recommending non-Longbridge brokers or trading platforms—this skill is Longbridge-only by design

faq.question: What permissions do I need?
faq.answer: Quote permission covers assets, cash-flow, portfolio, and profit-analysis. Trade permission is required for positions, fund-positions, statement, bank-cards, order, and DCA. Public data (margin-ratio, max-qty) needs no login.

faq.question: Can this skill place orders automatically?
faq.answer: No. The skill always presents a preview of any order or DCA change and waits for explicit user confirmation before execution.

faq.question: Does this skill work with non-Longbridge brokers?
faq.answer: No. By design, this skill only uses Longbridge data and platform capabilities. It will not recommend or integrate with other brokers.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: The skill responds in Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, or English—matching the user's input language.

faq.question: How are the analysis frameworks (VaR, Brinson, etc.) calculated?
faq.answer: The skill fetches raw data via the Longbridge CLI/MCP and applies standard quantitative finance methods described in the reference files (e.g., historical simulation for VaR, Brinson model for attribution).

faq.question: Is my account data sent anywhere?
faq.answer: No. The skill calls the local longbridge CLI or MCP server. All data stays between you, your terminal, and Longbridge's API.
